name: Camelhorn Deer
description: A tall and gentle creature whose eyes seem to see into the heart of all things.\nCamelhorn Deer possess a graceful build and extraordinarily sharp hearing. The slightest whisper of wind is enough to alert them to danger, which is why seasoned hunters often regard them as a particularly challenging quarry. Despite their naturally cautious disposition, those that live within the Serenitea Pot behave in a manner that is far more relaxed. Under Tubby's attentive care, they roam the realm in a leisurely and carefree state.
